stemHtml: In the event of an engine exhaust pipe fire while on the ground, the pilot should abort the start or continue with the shutdown and…

options.a: carry out a dry crank of the engine.
options.b: carry out a damp crank of the engine.
options.c: pull the fire shut off handle and trigger the engine fire-extinguishers.
options.d: fight the fire with a water fire-extinguisher.
